invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破1900（基于ATR 45.6307和支撑位）或融资费率转正超过0.03%（显示多头拥挤），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 1900 (based on ATR 45.6307 and support) or funding rate turns positive above 0.03% (indicating long crowding).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破80（基于ATR 2.1255和支撑位）或融资费率转正超过0.02%（空头平仓结束），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 80 (based on ATR 2.1255 and support) or funding rate turns positive above 0.02% (short covering ends).
